message:
feat(cass): tick 151 cx-thread export session helpers (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Second post-storage tick. Finishes cx-first coverage for cass.rs
(was 9/11, now 11/11) *and* rewrites the two public cx-first entry
points from pre-flight delegates into fully cx-threaded bodies.

New private helper siblings:
- estimate_session_content_tokens_with_cx — routes through
  export_segments_with_cx so the token estimate honours cancel
- resolve_export_session_with_cx — routes both the
  get_agent_session_with_cx probe and the bounded
  export_sessions_with_cx fallback so the full resolution scan is
  interruptible

Rewrites (public API unchanged; behaviour tightened):
- export_sessions_with_cx — was pre-flight checkpoint + delegate to
  legacy. Now threads cx through get_panes_with_cx +
  export_sessions_with_cx + per-session
  estimate_session_content_tokens_with_cx inside the loop. Every
  storage seam (and every loop iteration that invokes the token
  estimate) honours cancellation.
- export_content_with_cx — was pre-flight checkpoint + delegate.
  Now routes through resolve_export_session_with_cx and
  scan_segments_with_cx.

Test: `cass_export_content_with_cx_missing_session_matches_legacy`
pins that the missing-session error is byte-equal across the legacy
and cx-first paths — proves resolve_export_session_with_cx walks the
same fallback scan and returns the same Storage(NotFound) message,
not a new/drifted error path. Verified via fork bypass:
74/74 cass:: tests pass (+1 from 73).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
